song.title: Be Thou My Vision
song.author: Eleanor Hull, Mark E. Byrne
song.lyrics:
[V1] .D Bm G A D Be Thou my vision, O Lord of my heart; .A G A Naught be all else to me save that Thou art. .Bm D D/F# G A Thou my best thought by day or by night, .Bm F#m G A D Waking or sleeping Thy presence my light.
[V2] .D Bm G A D Be Thou my Wisdom and Thou my true Word; .A G A I ever with Thee and Thou with me, Lord; .Bm D D/F# G A Thou my great Father, I thy true son; .Bm F#m G A D Thou in me dwelling, and I with Thee one.
[V3] .D Bm G A D Be Thou my battle-shield, sword for my fight, .A G A Be Thou my dignity, Thou my delight. .Bm D D/F# G A Thou my soul's shelter, Thou my high tow'r. .Bm F#m G A D Raise Thou me heav'nward, O Pow'r of my pow'r.
-!!
[V4] .D Bm G A D Riches I need not, nor man's empty praise, .A G A Thou mine inheritance, now and always: .Bm D D/F# G A Thou and Thou only, first in my heart, .Bm F#m G A D High King of heaven my Treasure Thou art.
[V5] .D Bm G A D High King of heaven, my victory won, .A G A May I reach heaven's joys, bright heav'ns Son, .Bm D D/F# G A Heart of my own heart, whatever befall, .Bm F#m G A D Still be my vision, O ruler of all.
